item.title: KylePorterNS: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 18h What non-Rory-on-12 shot will you remember from this year's Masters? The more random the
item.description:
Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 18h What non-Rory-on-12 shot will you remember from this year's Masters? The more random the moment, the better.
Mine is this delicate second shot Scottie hit into 14 on Saturday. Stuck out a little right, he flighted one under the trees that had to perfectly crest the hill in Mostrar más 179 6 128 512 mil
